name: ELEMENT MATERIAL TECHNOLOGY LLC
address: 63020 LOWER MEADOW DR STE 3, BEND, OR 97701

fr.elements: Main Building; Vehicle Parking Area; Landscaped Area; Sidewalk Network
fr.considerations: Multiple Access Points; Limited Rear Access; Fenced Sections
fr.recommendations: Enhancing the clarity and visibility of multiple access points could facilitate more effective entry and movement for emergency responders. Improving the maneuverability in the vehicle parking area by ensuring it is free from unnecessary obstacles may support repositioning of emergency vehicles and equipment rapidly. Consideration could be given to ensuring clear markings on the sidewalk network, enhancing both navigation and responder movement throughout the property. Maximizing visibility and accessibility by potentially minimizing or strategically designing fenced sections might improve responder access to limited rear areas, supporting comprehensive coverage during emergency operations. Properly maintaining landscaped areas would also support clear lines of sight and unhindered access along pathways and entry points.

wildfire.conditions: Vegetated Perimeter; Scattered Trees; Vegetation Adjacent to Structure; Scattered Trees; Dense Tree Canopy
wildfire.recommendations: Enhancing defensible space around the property by managing the vegetated perimeter while increasing the separation between scattered trees could improve wildfire resilience. Reducing the density of the tree canopy may also decrease fuel continuity, potentially minimizing fire spread opportunities across the landscape. Attention should be given to managing vegetation directly adjacent to the structure, thus reducing exposure and assisting in limiting heat and ember impacts. By strategically thinning trees and maintaining open areas around the residence and other structures, the property may better support suppression efforts and firefighter access. Sustained maintenance of these vegetation management activities will contribute to long-term wildfire preparedness and resilience.
